goal: Move the MCP server implementation behind the intelligence_serving namespace while preserving the top-level module path through a compatibility wrapper.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Keep chip_runtime.py top-level in this tranche to avoid a larger serving rewrite
behavioral_changes: The real MCP server implementation now lives under chip_labs.intelligence_serving.
The old top-level chip_mcp_server module now acts as a compatibility wrapper.
The serving namespace API now imports ChipMCPServer from the moved implementation directly.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.chip_mcp_server import ChipMCPServer; from chip_labs.intelligence_serving.chip_mcp_server import ChipMCPServer as moved_ChipMCPServer; from chip_labs.intelligence_serving import ChipMCPServer as api_ChipMCPServer; import chip_labs.cli; print('serving-mcp-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: The next serving move is likely chip_runtime.py because it is now the largest top-level implementation still anchoring the serving surface.
Keep compatibility wrappers until the serving namespace owns the full surface.
